blended.narrative: Mont-Sauvage (Owl's Head) is expecting dry conditions over the next 48 hours with little to no accumulation. The 14-day outlook shows 12 inches total. Mild temps with highs near 45°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Friday: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Sunday: 2.3" of snow, highs of 31°F. Expect variable conditions.
Monday: 3.2" of snow, highs of 45°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
